rationale: In the citing paper, Kuksov and Villas-Boas (2008) appears only once, in a grouped citation used to justify the assumption that price is the only endogenous variable in the empirical application. The citing paper does not develop its core model, estimator, or contribution by directly building on that specific study. Its main methodological grounding is elsewhere (e.g., Villas-Boas and Winer 1999, Petrin and Train 2004, BLP-related work). This makes the citation a brief precedent reference rather than a substantive directional link.
